title: Viners Barware Cocktail Strainer
features: PERFECT COCKTAILS | This durable stainless steel cocktail strainer is an essential tool for any mixologist. It is ideal for removing ice, muddled fruits and herbs as it is poured into the drinking glass for a smoother cocktail drink.
SIZE | This cocktail strainer will fit most standard-sized cocktail shakers and mixing glasses.
TAKING CARE | Please handwash with warm soapy water.
VINERS BARWARE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home.
VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage.
description: From the manufacturer Glass Cocktail Shaker Silver Cocktail Shaker Spirit Pourer Gift Set Cocktail Mixing Spoon Double Measure Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 8 3.9 out of 5 stars 43 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 Price £14.95 £ 14 . 95 £7.39 £ 7 . 39 £9.30 £ 9 . 30 £1.93 £ 1 . 93 £9.30 £ 9 . 30 Description Perfect your mixology skills with this sophisticated cocktail shaker. Made from durable, heavy weight glass with a decorative, linear cut design. The ideal size for a single cocktail drink serving. This classic shaped cocktail shaker with a brushed steel finish features an airtight lid with integral strainer - perfect for preparing creative cocktails at home. A pair of versatile pouring spouts that fit a variety of bottle necks. Suitable for measuring spirits, syrups and oils - perfect for preparing creative cocktails or food at home. Professionally mix your favourite cocktail with this mixing spoon. Upside down, using the flat end and twisted handle, you can layer spirits to create stacked cocktails and drinks in tall glasses. Our double measure is essential for measuring accurately when making cocktail drinks or serving spirits when entertaining. It features both single 30ml capacity and a double tot 60ml capacity measures, ideal for pouring like a true bartender Made From Glassware & Stainless Steel Stainless Steel Stainless Steel Stainless Steel Stainless Steel Dishwasher Friendly ✓ ✓ ✓ no data ✓ Available In 280ml 500ml 2 Piece Set 27cm 30ml & 60ml
